title: BC Hydro Expands EV Fast-Charging Network with Two New Hubs in Port Moody
content: BC Hydro has inaugurated two new electric vehicle (EV) fast-charging hubs in Port Moody, British Columbia, enhancing the province's EV infrastructure. These additions bring BC Hydro's total number of public EV charging ports to over 600, supporting the growing adoption of zero-emission vehicles. The new hubs are strategically located to provide convenient charging options for residents and visitors, contributing to the province's clean energy goals.
author: Analysts Account
